If you have the perfect pitch once and you do it once you get paid once Now there's a dude Running around this planet right now. He was here yesterday. I think I gotta get it I thought it's perfect and I got a game to be okay. I want to bring out Russell Brunson. Come here, man This dank I'm gonna say a few minutes. He asked if I would come back down and tell you guys a little bit about what we did. First off, thank you everyone who invested real quick. Awesome. So we're up in our hotel room last night processing all the orders. Most of you guys we got all the orders through. For the handful they didn't go through. You should have got a text message email from us today. If you haven't yet, my team's up in 118 rerunning credit cards. So if you didn't get something to work for some reason during the break, we have a 30 minute break here in a second. You can run up there and get it in that way. You get all the bonuses everything we talked about. But I was talking to my team and it's been fun as I was getting pictures with all of you guys for like 5 and a half hours yesterday which was super fun. The questions kept coming over and over. It was like how did you do that? How did you do that? We're at a sales conference and we saw the greatest sales thing that we ever seen. How did you do that? And as I said to my team we were processing orders and I was like you would be really cool to do for this group. Something I've never done before but I think would be really, really cool. How many of you guys would like to learn how to sell the way that I did yesterday? Alright, about half of you guys. The other half don't want to make 3 million bucks in an hour and a half. How many of you guys want to learn how to sell the way I did yesterday? Okay, so we're sitting there brainstorming. What can we do? What can we do to add more value to everybody? So what we decided to do, the way that I sold yesterday, the way that I sell when I do it, it's not something I just made up overnight. About 12 years ago I went to an event kind of like this. I was a shy, awkward, nerdy kid who sat in the back of the room awkwardly taking notes, listening to all these amazing speakers. I remember the very first time I saw a table rush. I saw a bunch of people jump up and run the back of the room. I remember as a young kid I was doing the math at people running in the back and the guy was selling the $2,000 product and I was doing math with 2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12. I was like, that dude just made $80,000 in an hour. I was completely blown away. And that's the next I get up and he sold a $5,000 package. I'm doing the math and that guy did like $150,000 an hour. And I was like, this is a skill set I have to learn. And I didn't want, like, if you guys know me at home, there's a couple of my friends in the audience. I'm a very shy, introverted person. And I didn't necessarily want to get on stages, but I was like, I have to learn that skill set. If somebody can make $150,000 an hour, somebody can make $3 million an hour, whatever it costs, whatever it takes, I have to learn that skill set. So I spent the next 12 years of my life mastering that. I spent three years on the road every single weekend going to event after event after event, speaking, selling, practicing, learning, networking with the speakers to have them crafting my presentation. And I spent over a million dollars having coaches take me and tweak my presentation, tweak it, tweak it, tweak it until I got really good. And then after that, my three years on the road, I started doing it online because I didn't want to leave my wife and my kids and started doing it online. And we've done webinars and webinars and tele seminars and a whole bunch of things. And what you guys saw yesterday is kind of the culmination of that. And so we were talking about, I text Grant and Jared last night. I was like, what if I came to these guys and everybody who invested yesterday, what if I do a special one day training where I literally, we watched the video presentation from yesterday and I'll walk through like what I did on this slide. Why did I do that? What was the reason? Why did I point this direction to the room instead of this direction? Why was I walking? Like everything is choreographed. Why did I do those things? And walk you second by second, minute by minute through the entire 90 minute presentation. Then after that, I'm going to actually give you guys my PowerPoint slides, the framework that I use and then show you guys how to take whatever it is you're selling, whatever product, whatever service and weave it into those slides. How many of you guys would like to attend something like that? All right, cool. So we're going to do everybody who invested yesterday. Congratulations, you guys already have it. I will give that all to you guys as a gift. That awesome? Is it okay if we over deliver? So make sure you guys are okay with that. All right. That's number one. Number two, for those of you guys, I'm actually flying home tonight here in about two hours from now. So anybody, we have a 30 minute break coming up right now. Anybody who during that 30 minute break gets up, who didn't invest yet, you get up in section 118. My team's back there with a whole bunch of order forms. If you guys get the package that I offered you guys yesterday, you go invest in that. I will have that and I will let you guys come to that training as well. It's going to be a virtual training with it online. It's going to be a full day event. And I guess we're going to go first off going through yesterday's presentation. Second off, I'm going to give you the actual slide decks that I use to create all my presentations and I'll walk you guys through this. Now just kind of put this in perspective. This is a presentation that works in pretty much every market we've tried in so far. I've got a friend who's a chiropractor. He used to hotel meetings to try to get business. We gave him this presentation structure. He made some tweaks and now he's filling his practice month in and month out with this. It works in those kind of business. It works for some information products. One of our friends, Brandon and Katelyn Polin, she is actually, she voxed me last night and she said, tell all those masculine men out there that a 23 year old girl took this presentation and we did $10 million last year with it. She took the exact same presentation structure I'm going to give you guys and she did $10 million doing the same presentation. This works in almost any market you can dream of and you guys will get it for free. All you got to do is make sure you get invested before I take off. So it's going to happen. We're going to have a 30 minute break. It starts in 49 seconds from now. When that happens, everybody who invested, you guys are all good to go. Those who haven't yet and you're wondering about it, it's time to do it. It's time to jump up and go up to section 118. Like I said, you'll get an email from us early next week with the times, the dates, all that kind of stuff. We will record it in case you have to miss it. But this is the one time thing that I wanted to do for you guys just to show. Because so many of you guys asked me how in the world I did that. I thought it'd be fun to give you guys that gift. And with that said, thanks again so much for hanging out with me. I appreciate you having the time of my life. Thank you so much and I'll see you guys soon. Bye everybody.
